mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE feature_type = 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AND status = 'FAILED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application_case ac WHERE ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fit_analysis f WHERE f.application_case_id = ac.id)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fit_analysis WHERE created_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY)
